## Q&A with Andrew Ng, Founder, DeepLearning.AI and Greg Hart, President & CEO, Coursera

Get direct access to Andrew Ng and Greg Hart in this Q&A discussion. Come early to secure your spot, seating is first come, first served. Bring your questions and join the conversation.
